pdf.header.title: Race Nutrition Plan
pdf.product.shoppingTip: ✔ Shopping tip: Buy 1× Energy Gel Variety Pack (saves {{currency}}{{amount}} vs separate boxes) — covers all flavours in your plan
pdf.training.multipack: Because your region sells in multi-packs, your cart includes {{cart}} gels — with {{extra}} extra perfect for training runs before race day.
pdf.training.prepTitle: How to use the extras for race prep:
pdf.training.tip1: Practice with gels on long runs 3–4 weeks before your race to train your gut
pdf.training.tip2: Replicate your race-day fuelling schedule during training (same timing, same products)
pdf.training.tip3: Start with 1 gel per hour and build up to your target race frequency
pdf.training.tip4: Never try a new product on race day — always test in training first
pdf.sodium.line1: For endurance events >4 hours in hot or humid conditions, pre-race sodium loading
pdf.sodium.line2: enhances performance and reduces cramping risk.
pdf.sodium.line4: •  Mix 20.5 g salt (about 2 teaspoons) into 2.5 L of water or electrolyte drink
pdf.sodium.line5: •  Drink steadily over 2–4 hours; do not chug (GI comfort matters)
pdf.sodium.line6: •  Pair with your pre-race meal for best effect
pdf.sodium.line7: This boosts plasma sodium and blood volume, extending your aerobic capacity.
pdf.footer: Built with Lecka — real food, real performance — getlecka.com
